symptom_responses.do you have any cardiac history: I had a bypass surgery 8 years ago for coronary artery disease
symptom_responses.have you taken antacids: yes, I took three antacid tablets and it has not helped at all
symptom_responses.any arm or jaw symptoms: no, none of that typical heart stuff
symptom_responses.any recent similar episodes that went aw: yes, I had similar brief back pain episodes last week but they went away quickly

test_results.ECG: standard 12-lead shows ST depression in V1-V3 and tall R waves in V1-V2, subtle changes easily missed
test_results.troponin: initial troponin 0.22 ng/mL elevated, repeat at 3 hours 0.88 ng/mL rising significantly
test_results.posterior_ECG_leads: ST elevation in V7, V8, V9 posterior leads confirming posterior STEMI
test_results.chest_xray: no pulmonary edema, no pneumothorax, normal cardiac silhouette
test_results.echocardiogram: posterior and inferior wall hypokinesis, estimated EF 42%
test_results.BMP: glucose 168 mg/dL, creatinine 1.2 mg/dL, electrolytes normal
